name_en: Mongolian Oak and Hardy Kiwi of Iwaizawa
description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) consisting of a Mongolian oak and a hardy kiwi vine. Municipally designated by Yurihonjo City on 1995-10-23. Located at Ukigai 42, Higashiyuri Oikata, Yurihonjo City.
A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) marshland. Municipally designated by Yurihonjo City on 2002-02-13. Located at Kaminakajima 131, Kaminari-ta, Nagasaka, Yurihonjo City.

name_en: Japanese Fatminnow (Hotoke Loach) and Its Habitat
description_en: A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) comprising the fatminnow loach and its habitat. Municipally designated by Yurihonjo City on 2004-12-10. Located in the Katahoyama district, Nishime-machi Nishime, Yurihonjo City.

A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) comprising the bell cricket and its habitat. Municipally designated by Yurihonjo City on 2004-12-10. Located within part of Hamadate Park, Yagata, Deto, Nishime-machi, Yurihonjo City.
A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) camellia grove. Municipally designated by Yurihonjo City on 2004-12-10. Located at Nekonosawa, Nishime-machi Nishime, Yurihonjo City.
A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) zelkova tree. Municipally designated by Yurihonjo City on 2016-01-28. Located at Teranoshita 27, Maego, Yurihonjo City.
A natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu) zelkova tree. Municipally designated by Yurihonjo City on 2016-01-28. Located at Kataho 29, Nishime-machi Nishime, Yurihonjo City.
An intangible folk cultural property (mukei minzoku bunkazai), the Yakunai bangaku folk performing art. Municipally designated by Yuzawa City on 2000-10-26.

name_romaji: Oshikiri Shin Shūshū no Kaseki Hyōhon
name_en: Fossil Specimens Collected by Shin Oshikiri

A tangible cultural property (yukei bunkazai) in the sculpture category. Municipally designated by Yuzawa City on 2025-06-13.

name_romaji: Kyū Myōōzan Kongōin Denrai no Komen

description_en: A tangible cultural property (yukei bunkazai) in the historical materials category, a map of the old Yuzawa castle. Municipally designated by Yuzawa City on 2023-03-02.
